metaTitle: Coin Wizard Review 2026 | Sweeps Casino Rating
metaDesc: Our 2026 Coin Wizard review covers the welcome bonus, daily rewards, game library, low $50 redemption threshold, and which US states are restricted.
intro: Coin Wizard is a free-to-play social and sweepstakes casino run by Golden Hearts Games, the Massachusetts-based operator best known for its charity-fundraising platform of the same name. It uses the familiar dual-currency model, with Gold Coins for casual play and Sweeps Coins that can be entered into promotional sweepstakes and redeemed for prizes where permitted. The site stands out from many newcomers thanks to a low redemption threshold and a varied slot and table library. As a sweepstakes brand, no purchase is ever required to receive Sweeps Coins or to play.
welcome: New players are offered a no-purchase signup package that includes Gold Coins plus a small allocation of Sweeps Coins simply for registering. Coin Wizard also makes an optional, discounted first-purchase Gold Coin bundle available that adds extra Sweeps Coins, though buying is never required. The headline figure for the free welcome package has been reported around 25,000 Gold Coins and a few Sweeps Coins.
daily: The platform leans on recurring engagement promotions, including a multi-day consecutive login reward that builds over roughly a week. Coin Wizard also supports the standard no-purchase mail-in (AMOE) method for requesting free Sweeps Coins. Together these give regular players steady ways to top up their balances without spending money.
games: Coin Wizard offers a browser-based and mobile-friendly library of casino-style slots and table games supplied by third-party studios. Reviewers generally describe its game count and bonus mix as stronger than the operator's original Golden Hearts platform. The catalogue covers classic and video slots alongside RNG table games.
redeem: A standout feature is the low minimum redemption threshold, with gift-card redemptions reported to start around $50, roughly half the industry norm. Coin Wizard distinguishes between bonus (unplayed) Sweeps Coins and redeemable Sweeps Coins won through gameplay, so only the latter can be cashed out. Standard KYC identity verification applies before any redemption is approved.
trust: Golden Hearts Games operates from a transparent US business address and publishes complete legal pages, including official sweepstakes rules, terms, and privacy policy. The parent brand has a multi-year operating history dating to 2020 with no major outstanding complaints noted by reviewers. Sweeps Coins are tied to a no-purchase-necessary sweepstakes structure to comply with US law.
pros: Unusually low redemption threshold (around $50 for gift cards)
No-purchase welcome package plus a seven-day login reward
Backed by an established, transparent US operator (Golden Hearts Games)
cons: Sweeps Coins are blocked in a long list of US states
Separation of bonus vs. redeemable Sweeps Coins can confuse new players

faqs.a: Coin Wizard is operated by Golden Hearts Games, a US company based in Massachusetts that also runs the Golden Hearts charity-gaming platform.

faqs.q: Do I have to pay to play or win at Coin Wizard?
faqs.a: No. Coin Wizard is a no-purchase-necessary sweepstakes casino. You can receive Sweeps Coins for free through signup bonuses, daily login rewards, and a postal mail-in request method.

faqs.q: What is the minimum redemption at Coin Wizard?
faqs.a: Gift-card redemptions are reported to start around $50, which is lower than many competing sweepstakes casinos. Only Sweeps Coins won through gameplay are eligible, and identity verification is required.

metaDesc: ThrillCoins review for 2026: welcome bonus, daily wheel, 3,000+ games, 100 SC redemption minimum, playthrough rules, and restricted US states explained.
intro: ThrillCoins is a free-to-play sweepstakes casino launched in 2026 by WW Funcrafters JWA LLC, the Delaware operator behind the wider SpeedSweeps family of sites such as SpeedSweeps, SweepsRoyal and RichSweeps. As one of the family's newest brands, it pairs a very large game library with the no-purchase Gold Coins and Sweeps Coins model used across the group. Early Trustpilot feedback has been positive, though it is still too new for a long reputation track record. No purchase is required to obtain Sweeps Coins or to play.
welcome: New registrations come with a free welcome bonus of Gold Coins plus a small amount of Sweeps Coins, with no promo code or purchase needed. The reported free package is around 50,000 Gold Coins and 1 Sweeps Coin. First-time buyers can also claim a discounted starter purchase with a sizable bonus boost, but buying is always optional.
daily: ThrillCoins runs the SpeedSweeps family's recurring promotions, including a Daily Wheel bonus and referral rewards, plus assorted regular offers. These give players repeatable, no-cost ways to refresh their balances. A postal mail-in method is also available for requesting free Sweeps Coins.
games: The library is one of ThrillCoins' biggest selling points, reportedly stretching past 3,000 titles spanning slots, RNG tables, fish games, instant wins and live dealer rooms. Content comes from well-known studios such as Betsoft, BGaming, Big Time Gaming, Hacksaw Gaming and Evolution. The breadth makes it appealing for players who want variety.
redeem: The minimum redemption is reported at 100 Sweeps Coins (about $100), and a 1x playthrough requirement applies to all Sweeps Coin bonuses before winnings become redeemable. Residents of certain states, including Florida and New York, are subject to a monthly redemption cap reported around $5,000 per sweepstakes entry period. Standard identity verification applies.
trust: ThrillCoins operates under US sweepstakes law, with excluded states built into the signup acknowledgment step to block registration from restricted jurisdictions. It shares operational practices with the broader SpeedSweeps family, which reviewers note has passed credibility checks and uses transparent terms. Sweeps Coins cannot be purchased directly and are obtained free or via optional Gold Coin purchases.
pros: Very large game library, reported to exceed 3,000 titles
Daily Wheel, referral rewards, and other recurring no-cost bonuses
Part of the established SpeedSweeps / WW Funcrafters family
cons: Higher 100 SC minimum redemption than some rivals
Very new brand with a limited public reputation track record

faqs.a: ThrillCoins is operated by WW Funcrafters JWA LLC, a Delaware company that also runs the SpeedSweeps family of sweepstakes casinos, including SpeedSweeps, SweepsRoyal and RichSweeps.

faqs.q: How many games does ThrillCoins have?
faqs.a: ThrillCoins offers a large library reported to exceed 3,000 titles, including slots, table games, fish games, instant wins and live dealer games from major studios.

faqs.q: What is the minimum redemption at ThrillCoins?
faqs.a: The minimum redemption is reported at 100 Sweeps Coins (about $100), with a 1x playthrough requirement on bonus Sweeps Coins. Some states also have a monthly redemption cap.

metaTitle: Sweet Sweeps Review 2026 | Sweeps Casino Rating
metaDesc: Sweet Sweeps review 2026: candy-themed sweeps casino with 1,400+ games, daily cashback, 60 SC redemption minimum, fast payouts, and restricted states.
intro: Sweet Sweeps is a candy-themed social and sweepstakes casino that launched in the summer of 2025, owned and operated by Inimitable Solutions Limited, an iGaming company registered in Gibraltar. It runs on the standard no-purchase sweepstakes model with Gold Coins for play and Sweeps Coins for prize redemption, and is available across most US states. The brand has quickly built out a sizable game library and offers seven-days-a-week live chat support. Player feedback is still early, with a roughly 4.1/5 Trustpilot rating from a modest review count.
welcome: New players receive a no-purchase welcome bonus reported at 7,500 Gold Coins and 2 Sweeps Coins, released automatically without a promo code. As a sweepstakes site, buying Gold Coin packages is optional and Sweeps Coins are never sold directly. The signup offer is aimed at giving newcomers an immediate, free taste of real-prize play.
daily: Sweet Sweeps supports ongoing player promotions, including daily cashback tied to VIP level (reported in the 5%-15% range), a daily reload bonus, recurring tournaments and birthday bonuses. These give returning players repeatable ways to earn additional Gold Coins and Sweeps Coins. A no-purchase postal entry method is also part of its sweepstakes structure.
games: The candy-themed lobby features a growing library reported at well over 1,400 titles, including 1,100+ slots, table games, live dealer rooms and live game shows from around 15 software providers. The presentation is polished and the provider lineup is drawn from established studios. The variety covers casual slot fans and live-casino players alike.
redeem: Players must accumulate a minimum of 60 Sweeps Coins before requesting a prize, with reported limits of up to 999 SC per request and around 5,000 SC in any 24-hour window. Sweet Sweeps is noted for relatively fast processing, with many redemptions reported completed within 6-12 hours. Identity (KYC) verification is required before payouts.
trust: Inimitable Solutions Limited operates Sweet Sweeps from a registered Gibraltar address and publishes full sweepstakes rules and supporting legal pages. The site enforces KYC verification, uses standard security measures, and follows the no-purchase sweepstakes model to operate legally across most US states. As a 2025 launch, its long-term reputation is still developing.
pros: Low 60 SC redemption minimum with fast 6-12 hour processing reported
Large, polished game library exceeding 1,400 titles
Daily cashback, reload bonuses and seven-day live chat support
cons: Relatively new (2025) brand with a still-developing reputation
Excluded in a meaningful number of US states

faqs.a: Sweet Sweeps is owned and operated by Inimitable Solutions Limited, an iGaming company registered in Gibraltar. It launched in the summer of 2025.

faqs.q: How fast are Sweet Sweeps redemptions?
faqs.a: Many Sweet Sweeps redemptions are reported processed within about 6-12 hours after verification, which is faster than many competing sweepstakes casinos. A minimum of 60 Sweeps Coins is required to redeem.

faqs.q: Is Sweet Sweeps available in my state?
faqs.a: Sweet Sweeps is available in most US states but excludes several where sweepstakes play is restricted. Check the site's terms during signup to confirm your state is eligible.

metaTitle: Chip'n Win Review 2026 | Sweeps Casino Rating
metaDesc: Chip'n Win review 2026: three-currency sweeps casino with Crystals, daily login rewards, a large game library, SC redemptions, and restricted states.
intro: Chip'n Win is a US-facing social and sweepstakes casino operated by Games United B.V. and registered in Delaware, presenting an all-American, Vegas-inspired theme. It is distinctive for using a three-currency system: Gold Coins for casual play, Sweeps Coins for prize redemption, and a third currency called Crystals that can be exchanged for bonuses and free spins. The platform is praised for its modern, sharp visual design and a large game catalogue. No purchase is required to obtain Sweeps Coins or to play.
welcome: New accounts are greeted with a no-purchase welcome package reported at 15,000 Gold Coins and 30 Crystals. Rather than handing over Sweeps Coins directly at signup, Chip'n Win routes much of its free value through Crystals, which can be converted into Gold Coin bonuses, Sweeps Coin bonuses and free Sweeps Coin spins. Purchasing Gold Coin packages is optional.
daily: Logging in every 24 hours lets players claim free Gold Coins, Sweeps Coins and Crystals, with rewards that increase on consecutive days. Crystals also unlock spins on a Crystal Wheel and other in-site bonuses. These mechanics give regular players steady, no-cost engagement rewards.
games: Chip'n Win carries a large library; reviewers cite figures ranging from several hundred core casino games to broader catalogues exceeding 3,000 titles across slots, crash, scratchcards, table games, instant wins and social live casino. Content comes from studios such as 3 Oaks, OnlyPlay, Habanero, Playson, Gamzix and Turbo Games. The modern interface is frequently highlighted as a strong point.
redeem: Redemptions require playing through Sweeps Coins at least 1x, with a reported minimum of 100 SC for cash prizes or 50 SC for gift cards. Players should note a reported cap on winnings derived solely from free-play bonus Sweeps Coins (around 40 SC), which can limit redemptions funded only by bonus SC. Identity verification applies before payouts.
trust: Chip'n Win operates as a US sweepstakes casino under Games United B.V. and does not hold a conventional gambling license, which is normal for this model. The site uses SSL encryption and publishes a privacy policy, cookie policy, sweepstakes rules and terms. Its compliance rests on the no-purchase-necessary sweepstakes structure rather than gaming licensure.
pros: Distinctive three-currency system with Crystals and a Crystal Wheel
Large, varied game library with a modern, polished interface
Escalating daily login rewards across multiple currencies
cons: Reported cap on winnings from bonus-only (free) Sweeps Coins limits some redemptions
Excluded in a number of US states

faqs.a: Chip'n Win is operated by Games United B.V. and registered in Delaware. It runs as a US social and sweepstakes casino with a Vegas-inspired theme.

faqs.q: What are Crystals at Chip'n Win?
faqs.a: Crystals are Chip'n Win's third currency, separate from Gold Coins and Sweeps Coins. They can be exchanged for Gold Coin bonuses, Sweeps Coin bonuses, free Sweeps Coin spins and spins on the Crystal Wheel.

faqs.q: What is the minimum redemption at Chip'n Win?
faqs.a: Reported minimums are about 100 Sweeps Coins for cash and 50 Sweeps Coins for gift cards, with a 1x playthrough requirement. Note a reported cap on winnings sourced purely from free bonus Sweeps Coins.

metaDesc: Yayz review 2026: a Skillz-linked sweeps casino with strong bonuses, a low SC redemption threshold, slots and tables, and restricted US states.
intro: Yayz is a US social and sweepstakes casino created by the team behind Skillz, Inc., the long-running skill-based mobile gaming company. While clearly linked to Skillz (players can even sign up using a Skillz account), Yayz is a standalone product focused on mainstream casino-style slots and tables rather than skill competitions. Reviewers describe it as a straightforward sweepstakes casino with strong bonuses and a player-friendly low redemption threshold, though its game count is more modest than the largest rivals. Testing has consistently found it to be a legitimate sweepstakes operation.
welcome: New players receive a no-purchase welcome package reported in the range of tens of thousands of Gold Coins plus several Sweeps Coins, sometimes bundled with free spins on a featured slot. No promo code or purchase is required; the bonus is credited after completing registration. Optional Gold Coin purchase packages are available but never required.
daily: Yayz offers recurring promotions and daily free-coin opportunities aimed at keeping casual players engaged. A standard no-purchase postal entry method is also part of its sweepstakes framework for obtaining free Sweeps Coins. The mix favors casual players who want steady, low-effort top-ups.
games: The library is reported at roughly 1,500 titles, weighted toward slots alongside keno, dice and other instant-win games. It includes classic three-reel slots, higher-volatility video slots, jackpot titles and themed collections. While smaller than the biggest sweepstakes catalogues, the selection covers the core casual-casino categories.
redeem: Yayz is noted for a below-average minimum redemption threshold, which is attractive for casual players cashing out smaller balances; reported minimums vary by source around 50 to 100 Sweeps Coins. A 1x playthrough requirement applies to bonus Sweeps Coins before they become redeemable. Identity verification is required prior to payout.
trust: Yayz is backed by Skillz, Inc., an established US mobile gaming company, which lends the brand additional credibility for a newer sweepstakes entrant. The site operates under the no-purchase sweepstakes model and publishes the standard supporting legal pages. Independent reviews have consistently concluded it is a legitimate, safe sweepstakes casino.
pros: Below-average Sweeps Coin redemption threshold, good for casual players
Backed by Skillz, an established US gaming company
Strong, frequent bonuses for a newer sweepstakes brand
cons: Smaller game library than the largest sweepstakes rivals
Excluded in several US states, including California following AB 831

faqs.a: Yes. Yayz was created by the team behind Skillz, Inc., and players can sign up using a Skillz account. However, Yayz is a standalone sweepstakes casino focused on slots and tables, distinct from the skill-based Skillz platform.

faqs.q: What is the redemption threshold at Yayz?
faqs.a: Yayz is known for a below-average minimum redemption threshold, reported around 50 to 100 Sweeps Coins depending on the source, with a 1x playthrough requirement on bonus Sweeps Coins.
Independent reviews have consistently found Yayz to be a legitimate sweepstakes casino. It is backed by the established US company Skillz, Inc. and operates under the no-purchase sweepstakes model.
